tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, low total CO₂, low urine specific gravity, significant proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal). HbA1c is low, but there is evidence of renal dysfunction and possible nephrotic syndrome or acute kidney injury. Findings suggest impaired renal function with possible tubular damage and abnormal urinary excretion. Further nephrological evaluation and clinical correlation are strongly recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
